settings.title: Special Workspaces
settings.description: Configure Hyprland special workspaces shown in the bar widget.

drawer.label: Show Drawer
drawer.description: Hide workspaces in drawer when not focused/active

expandDirection.label: Expand Direction
expandDirection.description: Which direction the workspace pills expand from the main button.

focusBorderColor.label: Focus Border Color
focusBorderColor.description: Color of the border shown on the focused workspace.

enabled.label: Panel Background
enabled.description: Show a background behind the floating panel to mimic the system tray look.

panelBackgroundColor.label: Panel Background Color
panelBackgroundColor.description: Background color of the floating panel.

showPill.label: Show Pill
showPill.description: Show a colored circle behind the main button icon.

symbolColor.label: Symbol Color
symbolColor.description: Override the main button icon color.

pillColor.label: Pill Color
pillColor.description: Override the main button pill color.

showPill.label: Show Pill
showPill.description: Show a colored circle behind each workspace icon.
